name: Noon
description: Noon Capital is a decentralized stablecoin protocol that generates yield through delta-neutral strategies, making institutional-grade returns accessible to all users. The protocol's core products are USN, a stablecoin pegged to the US dollar, and sUSN, a yield-bearing stablecoin that accrues value over time from protocol-generated returns. Noon Capital is built with a focus on safety and long-term sustainability, with solvency verifiable onchain through independent proof of solvency. Revenue generated by the protocol flows into buybacks of $NOON, the protocol's governance token, which are then distributed to sNOON stakers.
